title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.064 - Subpoena of witnesses or production of records, powers of board
text:
103.064.  Subpoena of witnesses or production of records, powers of board. — The board shall have the power to subpoena witnesses or obtain the production of records when necessary for the performance of its duties.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 1 subsec. 26)
